address_space.description: The address space that is used by the virtual network.

edge_zone.description: The edge zone where the virtual network is located.

flow_timeout_in_minutes.description: The flow timeout duration in minutes for the network.

name.description: The name of the virtual network.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the virtual network.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
